products.title: Modern Style 3 Piece Power Motion Reclining Sectional
products.description:
Modern 3-piece power reclining sectional in stylish black corduroy fabric. Features left and right power reclining loveseats with plush channel tufted backs and seats for comfort. Includes LED under-lighting, Bluetooth speakers, USB charging ports, cup holders, and storage compartments in both consoles. Perfect for relaxing and entertaining.
Total Price: $3850
Down-Payment: $450
Payment Terms: $100/2 weeks

products.title: Modern Style King Bed, Dresser & Mirror
products.description:
Modern style king bedroom set including a king bed, dresser with a mirror, chest of drawers, and a nightstand. Features black wood finish with gold accents and light gray upholstered panels on the bed. Clean lines and elegant design that fits contemporary decor. Sturdy construction and spacious storage with multiple drawers. Perfect for a stylish and functional bedroom update. 
Total Price: $4900
Down-Payment: $500
Payment Terms: $150/2 weeks

products.title: Contemporary Style 2 Piece Sectional
products.description:
Contemporary 2-piece sectional in a soft, textured gray fabric offering plush, comfortable seating. Features a spacious right-side chaise lounge perfect for relaxing. Includes multiple decorative throw pillows in coordinating neutral colors. Supported by sturdy block feet. A stylish and cozy addition to any living room.
Total Price: $2450
Down-Payment: $350
Payment Terms: $100/2 weeks

products.title: Contemporary Style 2 Piece Sectional
products.description:
Enjoy both style and comfort with this contemporary 2-piece sectional set in a neutral beige tone. It features a spacious L-shaped design with plush seat and back cushions, accented by a mix of textured and patterned throw pillows for added coziness. The matching ottoman offers versatile use as a footrest or coffee table. Perfect for any modern living room, this sectional brings a warm, inviting atmosphere to your space.

products.title: Contemporary Style 2 Piece Sectional
